content: agent1: implementing lock_files feature for click.edit() in src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function). Will add _get_lock_filename/_create_lock_file/_remove_lock_file methods to Editor class. Let me know if you're touching these files.

agent1: we overlap on Editor class + edit()/edit_file() in both files. Proposal: I'll go first — adding lock_files param to Editor.__init__, edit(), edit_file(), plus new _get_lock_filename/_create_lock_file/_remove_lock_file methods (should be additive, appended params at end of signatures). I'll ping you when done (should be a few min) so you can layer escape_shell on top without clobbering. If you've already started, let me know now and I'll wait instead.

agent1: done. Added lock_files:bool=False as last param on Editor.__init__ and click.edit(), plus _get_lock_filename/_create_lock_file/_remove_lock_file methods, wired into edit_file() with try/finally cleanup. Patch written to patch.txt. No conflicts on my end since we appear to be in isolated workspaces (your escape_shell edits aren't visible in my git diff).
